# EVPulse - EV Battery Technology Resource

EVPulse (www.evpulse.co.in) is a technical resource for battery systems engineers, EV professionals, and enthusiasts.

## About

Deep-dive technical analysis on EV battery technology, BMS design, cell chemistry, thermal management, and charging infrastructure.

Author: Sai Chaitanya Dasari - Battery Systems Engineer with 3+ years at Volvo Eicher Commercial Vehicles

## Core Content

### Articles & Blog Posts
- /blogs - All technical articles
- /category/cell-chemistry - LFP, NMC, NMC 811, Na-ion cell analysis
- /category/bms-design - Battery management systems, SOC/SOH algorithms
- /category/thermal - Thermal management, immersion cooling
- /category/charging - Charging infrastructure, CCS, CHAdeMO, ISO 15118

### Interactive Tools
- /calculators - EV battery design calculators
- /calculators/pack-size - Battery pack designer
- /calculators/heat-generation - Thermal load analyzer
- /calculators/cooling-plate - Cooling system sizing
- /calculators/bus-bar - Bus bar & fusing calculator
- /calculators/soc-estimator - SOC estimator tool
- /calculators/charging-time - Charging time calculator

### About & Contact
- /about - About the author and EVPulse mission
- /contact - Contact form

## Expertise Areas

- BMS Algorithm Design (SOC, SOH estimation)
- Cell Chemistry Analysis (LFP, NMC, Na-ion)
- Thermal Management Systems
- EV Charging Infrastructure
- Battery Pack Design
- UN ECE R100, UL 2580, AIS-156 Compliance

## Update Frequency

New articles published 2+ times weekly covering latest in EV battery technology.
